what: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda.
title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda.
text: goal fecalcanuga provide data representing 5 months field work April - June 2023 (Canada) January - February (Uganda) collecting household commercial wastewater containment data characterizing physical, chemical greenhouse gas data 22 non-sewered sanitation sites southern Vancouver island southern gulf islands British Columbia, Canada 19 sites Kampala, Uganda.

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda.
text: can install development version fecalcanuga GitHub : Alternatively, can download individual datasets CSV XLSX file table .
code: # install.packages("devtools") devtools::install_github("kelseyshaw/fecalcanuga") ## Run the following code in console if you don't have the packages ## install.packages(c("dplyr", "knitr", "readr", "stringr", "gt", "kableExtra")) library(dplyr) library(knitr) library(readr) library(stringr) library(gt) library(kableExtra)

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda.
text: package provides access 4 datasets: containment, ghg, household_survey, phys_chem_parameter.

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda.
text: dataset containment contains data technical data (containment size, volume, fecal sludge depth, etc.) non-sewered sanitation system containment sampled part field work. 41 observations 10 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda.
text: dataset ghg contains data calculated mass flux rates measured point-source situ GHG measurments observed person equivalents containment three key greenhouse gases (CH4, CO2 N2O). 41 observations 7 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda.
text: dataset household_survey contains data collected household / institutional survey data location non-sewered sanitation containmenet sampled. includes demographic infromation, operational maintenance information technical environmental parameters. 41 observations 41 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda.
text: dataset phys_chem_parameter contains data measured situ analyzed laboratory physical, chemical biological parameters pertaining containment sampled well different veritcal locations containment (.e., Top containment, middle bottom). 119 observations 29 variables overview variable names, see following table.

title: Demographic, Environmental, Technical and Physio-chemical Data on Non Sewered Sanitation Containments in Rural Canada and Urban Uganda.

title: containment: Title goes here — containment
text: tibble 41 rows 10 variables sample_id unique identifier sampling location format ##-Location-ddmmyyyy location_id unique location identifier sampling day format (#)-day sampling () - location day date date sampling area surface area liquid surface containment m^2 sludge_depth depth meters, top sludge sample taken containment_depth depth, meters, top containment bottom containment containment_volume total volume containment m^3 fs_volume total volume sludge containment m^3 accumulation_rate accumulation rate litres/capita -year (based total volume number users) scum_depth depth top scum layer centimeters

title: ghg: Title goes here — ghg
text: tibble 41 rows 7 variables sample_id unique identifier sampling location format ##-Location-ddmmyyyy location_id unique location identifier sampling day format (#)-day sampling () - location day date date sampling users average number users sanitation system sampled flux_ch4 methane flux grams/capita-day - based number users flux_co2 carbon dioxide flux gram/capita-day - based number users flux_n20 nitrious oxide flux gram/capita-day - based number users

title: household_survey: Title goes here — household_survey
text: tibble 41 rows 41 variables sample_id unique identifier sampling location format ##-Location-ddmmyyyy location_id unique location identifier sampling day format (#)-day sampling () - location day date date sampling local_area_name community / area name locals commonly use samples taken establishment_type type establishment sampling occurred (household, commercial, school, office building, ) users average number users sanitation system sampled last_emptied years long ago sampling date containment last emptied shared_toilet toilet(s) connected sanitation containment shared (Yes/) rent_or_own establishment containment rented owned head household? containment type containment (septic tank, pit latrine, treatment plant unit, etc.) lining type containment lining (fully lined, unlined, know) lining_material material lining made lined (fiberglass, concreate, PVC, unlined, etc.) change_in_liquid_level change liquid level due seasonal variation (Y/N) baffles baffles containment (Y/N/know) outflow outflow containment (Y/N/know) outflow_location outflow, located (.e., leech field) toilet_type type toilet connected sanitation system (cistern flush, pour-flush, etc.) anal_cleansing_material type material used anal cleansing (water, paper, ) paper paper used anal cleansing (Yes = 1 | = 0) water water used anal cleansing (Yes = 1 | = 0) additives additives added containment (Y/N/know) frequency additives added, frequency? chemicals chemicals added sanitation system? wastewater_type types wastewater containment collects (toilet, kitchen, laundry, bathing) toilet containment collect type wastewater (Yes = 1 | = 0) bathing containment collect type wastewater (Yes = 1 | = 0) laundry containment collect type wastewater (Yes = 1 | = 0) kitchen containment collect type wastewater (Yes = 1 | = 0) water_connection type water connection establishment sampling occurring (tap inside building, standpipe, )? establishment type water connection (Yes = 1 | = 0) tap_inside_building establishment type water connection (Yes = 1 | = 0) standpipe establishment type water connection (Yes = 1 | = 0) containment_age age (years) containment system? containment_constructed constructed containment system (Technician, professional engineering, , know)? containment_volume (m^3) total volume containment? fully_emptied system last emptied emptied fully? (Y/N/know) emptying_interval average / typical emptying interval (years) containment? rainy_season currently rainy season? (Y/N) solid_waste containment contain solid waste (.e., garbage) (Y/N) type solid waste, type ? notes additional important notings / observations

title: phys_chem_parameter: Title goes here — phys_chem_parameter
text: tibble 119 rows 29 variables sample_id unique identifier sampling location format ##-Location-ddmmyyyy location_id unique location identifier sampling day format (#)-day sampling () - location day date date sampling depth_id unique identifier sample indicating location containment (T = top, M = middle, B = bottom) sludge_depth depth meters, top sludge sample taken temperature Temperature sludge insitu sampling location (degrees Celsius) dissolved oxygen concentration mg/L insitu sampling location pH pH value insitu sampling location ORP oxidation reduction potential, measured millivolts, insitu sampling locations EC electrical conductivity, measured microSiemens, insitu sampling locations COD Chemical oxygen demand, mg/L soluble_COD Soluble chemical oxygen demand, mg/L sulphide Sulphide, mg/L total_nitrogen Total Nitrogen, mg/L nitrite Nitrite, mg/L nitrate Nitrate, mg/L ammonia Ammonia, mg/L TKN Total Kjeldahl Nitrogen, mg/L ortho_phosphorous Ortho Phosphorous, mg/L total_phosphorous Total Phosphorous, mg/L BOD Biochemical oxygen demand, mg/L TOC Total organic carbon, mg/L ts Total solids, g/L vs Volatile Solids, g/L vs_percent Volatile Solids, % total solids sand_content Sand content, g/L tss Total suspended solids, g/L vss Volatile suspended solids, g/L vss_tss VSS/TSS (ratio)
